## Problem

A clear description of the problem or use case. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, or other context.
